Psychology: Psychology vyavhaar aur mansik prakriyaon ka vaigyanik adhyayan hai.
Learning: Learning anubhav ke madhyam se vyavhaar mein hone wala badlav hai.
Memory: Memory jaankari ko sangrahit aur yaad rakhne ki kshamta hai.
Motivation: Motivation vyakti ko kisi kaam ke liye prerit karne wali shakti hai.
